# ~~isCoffee()~~

> **Test Support Layer**

```ts
function isCoffee(value: unknown): value is { id: number; name: string; size: string; price: number; iced: boolean; caffeineMg: number };
```

Defined in: [src/app/testing/utility/coffee-parser.utility.ts:64](https://github.com/EmperorRAG/first-mcp/blob/3d2831b148eaa4c84c57fa062fce6df920f72a50/src/app/testing/utility/coffee-parser.utility.ts#L64)

Type guard that validates whether an `unknown` value conforms to
[CoffeeSchema](../../../../service/coffee/types/variables/CoffeeSchema.md).

## Parameters

| Parameter | Type      | Description            |
| --------- | --------- | ---------------------- |
| `value`   | `unknown` | The value to validate. |

## Returns

`value is { id: number; name: string; size: string; price: number; iced: boolean; caffeineMg: number }`

`true` if `value` conforms to [CoffeeSchema](../../../../service/coffee/types/variables/CoffeeSchema.md).

## Deprecated

No longer imported by any test.  Use
`Schema.is(CoffeeSchema)` directly in assertions instead.

## Remarks

Delegates to [Schema.is](https://effect-ts.github.io/effect/) with [CoffeeSchema](../../../../service/coffee/types/variables/CoffeeSchema.md) and
returns a type predicate narrowing to [Coffee](../../../../service/coffee/types/type-aliases/Coffee.md).
